hero.title: CUBA
hero.subtitle: TATTOO STUDIO

artists.title: OUR ARTISTS
artists.subtitle: Meet the talented artists who bring your ideas to life. Each with their unique style and years of experience.
artists.cta_description: Our artists are ready to turn your vision into reality. Schedule a consultation and discover which artist is perfect for your next tattoo.

services.title: OUR SERVICES
services.subtitle: We offer a wide range of professional tattoo services with the highest standards of quality and safety.

traditional.title: Traditional Tattoos
traditional.description: Classic and timeless designs with traditional techniques perfected over the years.

realistic.title: Realistic Tattoos
realistic.description: Portraits and hyperrealistic designs that capture every detail with photographic precision.

geometric.title: Geometric Tattoos
geometric.description: Perfect geometric patterns and shapes that combine modern art with mathematical precision.

color.title: Color Tattoos
color.description: Vibrant and colorful designs that bring your skin to life with the highest quality pigments.

coverup.title: Cover-ups
coverup.description: We transform old tattoos into new works of art with specialized cover-up techniques.

consultation.title: Design Consultation
consultation.description: We work with you to create the perfect design that captures your unique vision and personality.

gallery.title: GALLERY
gallery.subtitle: Explore our collection of completed works. Each tattoo tells a unique story.

contact.title: CONTACT
contact.subtitle: Have an idea for your next tattoo? Contact us and let's make your vision a reality.

placeholders.name: Your name
placeholders.message: Tell us about your tattoo idea...

footer.description: The art of tattooing in the heart of Cuba. We create unique experiences that last a lifetime, combining Cuban tradition with world-class modern techniques.
footer.copyright: © 2025 Cuba Tattoo Studio. All rights reserved.

david.name: David
david.description: Over 8 years of experience in realistic tattoos and portraits. David masters shading and detail techniques that bring each design to life. Specialized in portraits, animals, and still life with exceptional detail.

nina.name: Nina
nina.description: Versatile artist with 6 years of experience specialized in traditional and neo-traditional styles. Nina combines classic techniques with modern touches, creating unique and vibrant designs. Expert in solid lines, bright colors, and standout compositions.

karli.name: Karli
karli.description: Specialist in geometric and minimalist designs with 5 years of experience. Karli creates precise and elegant compositions that combine mathematics and art. Expert in clean lines, complex patterns, and contemporary designs that stand the test of time.
